overview: Just Real Estate — a high-end, interactive, visually immersive real estate demo experience for South Bopal, Ahmedabad. Cinematic hero with 3D parallax, horizontal snap-scroll property showcase with glassmorphism, scroll-choreographed storytelling sections, and premium micro-interactions throughout.
features: Cinematic fullscreen hero with 3D mouse tilt and staggered text reveal
Horizontal snap-scroll property showcase with glassmorphism panels
Scroll progress indicator and smooth inertia scrolling
Animated Why Us cards and dynamic Services hover system
Live Activity badges and Recently Added tags
